w3_boundary: The detector ladder and all val-A/val-B numbers are valid only within the CubiCasa SEG-IR universe. E1 real-drawing transfer is UNVERIFIED. (prereg_w3_v1 sec 0.5)
v0_isolation: deterministic_v0 is RETIRED (G-1). This cell is an independent new measurement under the deterministic_v1 name. No v0 number is compared or backfilled.

inherited_sources.transform_catalog: doe_P5.md sec 2.2 (T-META v1) + F04 PREREG relation_registry

rule_specification.measurement_scope: F01-F07 under deterministic_v1 name (independent new measurement; v0 isolated)

rules.input: SEG-IR line segments (schema ariadne.e2_ext_segir.v1); endpoints = pts[0], pts[-1]; units px

R1_parallel_band_pairing.text: exists segment m != l s.t. (a) undirected angular difference <= angle_tol_deg, (b) perpendicular gap between the two infinite lines in [gap_min_px, gap_max_px], (c) projected overlap along l's direction >= overlap_min_frac * min(len(l), len(m)). Pairing is marked symmetrically on both l and m.

rules.threshold_rationale: domain prior only (wall thickness 36-660 mm at 12 mm/px = 3-55 px gap; 12 deg parallel tolerance for vector noise; 0.25 overlap for co-extensive wall faces; 8 px ~= 96 mm minimum wall length). No value tuned to val-A DEV outcomes.
rules.no_layer_hint_reason: SEG-IR carries a single constant layer '0' (distinct=1 across all segments); a layer-hint rule is inert on this population and is therefore not part of deterministic_v1.

lid_definition.formula: LID = sha256(drawing_id + NUL + handle + NUL + insert_path + NUL + edge_index + NUL + occurrence_index)
lid_definition.cubicasa_binding: insert_path='', edge_index='0', occurrence_index='0' (flat raster-derived segments; no INSERT). Equivalent to (drawing_id, handle) since handle is unique per drawing.

metric.per_drawing_param_violation: v_{d,k,p} = (1/|L_d|) * sum_{l in L_d} 1[ yhat(before,l) != yhat(after, m(l)) ]; a mapped LID that disappears after transform counts as violation 1
metric.invalid_drawing_rule: drawings with |L_d| == 0 valid segments are isolated as invalid (NOT vacuous pass)
metric.cell_aggregation: R-META_k = mean_over_drawings( mean_over_params( v_{d,k,p} ) )  [equal-weight params first, then drawing-macro]

verdict_band.UNKNOWN: no admissible numeric measurement; never coerce to zero or PASS
verdict_band.BLOCKED_INPUT: required transform substrate absent from population; no admissible measurement (never vacuous-pass)
source: doe_P5.md sec 2.3 (drawing-macro violation rate; PASS<=0.02, INC<=0.10, FAIL>0.10)

rule_specification.family_verdict_rule: after sentinel qualification: all measurable cells PASS => family PASS; any FAIL => FAIL; else any INCONCLUSIVE => INCONCLUSIVE; any BLOCKED_INPUT/UNKNOWN/INADMISSIBLE prevents a complete family verdict.

F01.reason: pure translation of px coordinates; LID preserved

F03.reason: isotropic scale about centroid; LID preserved

F04.reason: CubiCasa SEG-IR is units='px' with NO $INSUNITS / scale_mm_per_unit metadata; the transform validity certificate ('coordinates, $INSUNITS, scale_mm_per_unit encode the same physical quantities') cannot be certified. doe_P5 sec 3.2 states unit-change is NOT CubiCasa's test-sheet; sec 6.2 rules unit-unknown drawings BLOCKED_DATA. Assigning an arbitrary unit is forbidden (invention).

F05.reason: CubiCasa SEG-IR segments carry only {handle, layer, pts}; there is NO INSERT / block / occurrence structure to explode. The transform is a vacuous no-op (no remaining INSERT trivially satisfied), which doe_P5 sec 2.3 forbids treating as a pass. doe_P5 sec 3.2 marks block-explode 'NA' for CubiCasa.

F06.reason: every segment has the single constant layer '0' (distinct=1); a bijective shuffle over a singleton is identity and the detector uses no layer feature, so the relation is a vacuous no-op with no truth-bearing substrate. doe_P5 sec 3.2: CubiCasa layers are neutral and NOT the test-sheet for meaningful layer-rename.

F07.reason: deterministic bounded dither of shared logical vertices on px coordinates; INVALID_TRANSFORM pairs (zero-length / changed incidence) excluded from denominator per doe_P5 sec 2.2

transforms.source: doe_P5.md sec 2.2 (T-META v1); F04 PREREG relation_registry

sentinel_qualification.floor_source: doe_P5.md sec 2.3 / sec 6.1 Q1 (recall>=0.20, set below classical-ML 0.370 as a hygiene floor, not an accuracy bar)
sentinel_qualification.zero_detector_rule: a constant-0 predictor yields recall 0 -> family ineligible for ranking
sentinel_qualification.all_detector_rule: a constant-1 (near-all) predictor with mean prediction rate >= near_all_thresh flagged and ineligible
sentinel_qualification.consequence_if_floor_unmet: all measured cells -> INADMISSIBLE (recorded honestly; no threshold re-search)

population.name: val-A DEV
population.forbidden: val-B (split B, state ADJ) and test are NOT touched

prohibitions: no v0 manifest/number consulted as input, comparison, or backfill (v0 isolation)
no threshold re-search: a band miss is recorded as-is, thresholds are not adjusted
no invention: an F-cell whose transform substrate is absent is BLOCKED_INPUT, never vacuous-passed
